title: Treecutter
description: Treecutter is a powerful Minecraft plugin that allows players to cut down entire trees at once.
body:
TREECUTTER PLUGIN - DESCRIPTION AND USAGE
==========================================

DESCRIPTION:
Treecutter is a powerful Minecraft plugin that allows players to cut down entire trees at once.
Features include configurable tree detection, permission-based access control, sneaking requirements,
tool durability reduction, auto-replant functionality, and player-specific toggles.
Perfect for survival servers that want to streamline tree harvesting while maintaining balance.

COMMANDS:
---------
/treecutter (or /tc) - Show help information
/treecutter reload - Reload plugin configuration
/treecutter toggle - Toggle plugin on/off globally
/treecutter toggle-sneaking - Toggle sneaking requirement for yourself
/treecutter toggle-replant - Toggle auto-replant feature for yourself

PERMISSIONS:
------------
treecutter.use
  - Description: Allows players to use the tree cutting feature when holding an axe and sneaking (if required)
  - Default: true

treecutter.reload
  - Description: Allows players to reload the plugin configuration using /treecutter reload
  - Default: op

treecutter.toggle
  - Description: Allows players to toggle the plugin on/off globally using /treecutter toggle
  - Default: op

treecutter.toggle-sneaking
  - Description: Allows players to toggle sneaking requirement for themselves using /treecutter toggle-sneaking
  - Default: true

treecutter.toggle-replant
  - Description: Allows players to toggle auto-replant feature for themselves using /treecutter toggle-replant
  - Default: true

HOW TO USE:
-----------
1. Install the plugin on your server
2. Give players the 'treecutter.use' permission (enabled by default)
3. Players can use an axe to break a log block while sneaking (if sneaking is required in config)
4. The entire tree will be cut down automatically
5. If auto-replant is enabled and the player has saplings, a new tree will be planted
6. Players can use commands to toggle personal preferences for sneaking and replanting

FEATURES:
---------
- Intelligent tree detection with configurable height and width limits
- Permission-based access control
- Optional sneaking requirement
- Tool durability reduction based on blocks broken
- Auto-replant functionality with sapling inventory check
- Player-specific toggles for sneaking and replanting
- Configurable tree and leaf types
- Admin commands for plugin management
- Comprehensive configuration options
